title: Blood N Wine 2
body:

Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to setup one? Just rent already configured server!

Click on the picture above, select plan(at least 4GB), use my code bloodnwine to get 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends!

 

Video:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QCFkMLwbgyc&t

 

Description:

Blood N Wine 2 is a Modpack that revolves around the idea of hardcore, low-tech survival, exploration and adventuring, along with aspects of anarchy (On the Server). This Modpack has a wide variety of mods that make the game more enjoyable and challenging. We made it our goal to make it the most fun Hardcore Modpack we could possibly make it, balancing every item and mechanic to achieve just the right amount of difficulty. This way PvE is actually a factor that the player must consider when roaming the world, from mobs that are far more intelligent and powerful than normal, to a number of restrictions to gameplay such as the True Darkness mod, which creates a significant disadvantage to players at night as it would in real life. This pack allows for a near-infinite amount of things to do, from creating elaborate contraptions (such as Tunnel Bores so you can be Elon Musk), performing magical rituals and exploration of a grand world, to the unique PvP and PvE potential offered by its difficulty and uncertainty.

Server IP:

Blood N Wine 2 Official bloodnwine.modded.fun

 

Features:

  • High IQ Mobs (Humanoid Mobs can break pretty much all player made blocks.
  • Many dungeons, Ruins and new structures to find and explore.
  • Ambient Sounds to make the world much more immersive.
  • New Passive and Hostile Mobs, including Nether mobs.
  • New weather types such as acid rain.
  • Health Regens ONLY when eating food.
  • New Nether Biomes and End Biomes.
  • More crops to farm and food to craft.
  • Armor damage calculation equation replaced with custom one.
  • Armor degrades in protection the lower the durability!
  • 1,500~ Block Continents.
  • Improved Fishing - you can now autofish.
  • Higher quality animal models.
  • Ice Spikes to defend your base from the High IQ mobs and Low IQ players (if you’re playing on the server).
  • Nether and End Ores.
  • Lunar Events.
  • Redstone Machines that you can build using Litematica instead of Modded Machines.
  • With many more for you to discover.
  • New Armors.
  • Mob Spawners Expire but last longer the farther you go from spawn and can also be re enabled by right clicking on them using a totem.
  • PvP and PvE balanced Tinkers Construct.
  • World Pre-Generator for low-end computers.
  • Minimalistic HUD.
  • Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map.
  • Creepers Camoflauge and can spawn Supercharged!
  • Harder Enderdragon
  • The Farlands
  • Wolfs can equip armor.
  • Longer day and night cycle (40min).
  • Custom Soundtrack (works on Windows, Mac and Linux now!).
  • Biomes O Plenty.
  • Terraforged.
  • Removed Herobrine.
